test.note: Pre-Phase7 baseline. Phase7 hypothesis (10,906 signals, quality tickers): excl poor R:R raised EV 0.114→0.177 (+55%). Target cap eliminates rr>=4.0 bucket (avg_ret=-0.605 before cap).
Pre-Phase7 baseline. Phase7 change: poor R:R gate added (same logic as S1). Low S2 signal volume means impact is modest.
Phase7 factory backtest (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/JPM/AVGO, 3yr). Post 7.4+7.6: poor R:R gate + trigger condition. n=35 >= 20, EV=0.515 > 0. Trigger=True: +17pp WR (52.9% vs 35.9%).

S8_StochasticCross.notes: _stop_is_valid() guard: nearest_support invalid now returns None directly (no ATR fallback). Previous +662R expectancy was a bug. Realistic: WR=57.1%, E=+0.166R train. Phase7: poor R:R excluded, trigger bar condition added.

S10_GoldenCrossPullback.notes: Train passes but test expectancy is slightly negative (-0.010R). Regime-sensitive — golden cross pullback underperforms in 2021-2026 period. Monitor; may need parameter tuning.

S8v2_StochasticSmaTrend.notes: S8v2 passes both gates (train 3602t WR=57.1% E=+0.166R, test 1000t WR=54.2% E=+0.133R) but results are identical to S8 — S8 already gates on SMA200 in should_enter(). No improvement. S8 kept in registry; S8v2 not registered.

tuning_log.change: 1A: excluded poor R:R — _compute_risk() returns None when rr_label=poor
tuning_log.rationale: Hypothesis backtest (10,906 signals, 30 tickers): poor R:R avg_return=-0.107 (all tickers), near-zero on quality tickers. Classic high-WR/negative-EV trap.
tuning_log.note: WR drops 5pp (expected — poor R:R signals have high WR but negative avg_return). EV +55%. Same gate applied to S2, S8.

tuning_log.change: 1C: target capped at entry+1.5xATR when resistance exceeds entry+2xATR
tuning_log.rationale: ENTRY signals with rr_ratio>=4.0 (avg_rr=6.49) had WR=43.1%, avg_return=-0.605. Targets too far to reliably reach. 123/355 ENTRY signals affected.

after.note: rr>=4.0 bucket eliminated by cap; those signals become rr<2.0. Full re-run not yet done.

tuning_log.change: 1A+1B: poor R:R gate added; trigger bar condition added (+score bonus)
tuning_log.rationale: 1A: same poor R:R evidence as S1/S2. 1B: S8 backtest (5 tickers, 56 signals) — trigger=True: WR=52.9% vs 35.9% without (+17pp, exceeds 10pp gate).
tuning_log.note: Stop fallback bug also fixed: nearest_support invalid now returns None directly (no ATR fallback).

tuning_log.change: Added price > SMA200 as first required condition

notes: SQ (Block Inc) had all 14 download jobs fail — yfinance reports possibly delisted. Excluded from future runs.

Initial run_backtest.py summary showed incorrect per-strategy stats due to aggregation bug (dict comprehension kept last ticker only). Fixed in run_backtest.py. True results computed directly from train_results.csv / test_results.csv.
S8 retired despite passing gates — expectancy inflated by near-zero risk denominator when nearest_support is within ticks of entry. Structural flaw in stop logic.
